name: Glazed Fresh Strawberry Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 red food coloring; a few drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash 1 pint of the strawberries using a fork and set aside.
2. Combine the sugar and cornstarch in a 3-quart saucepan.
3. Stir in the water and mashed berries.
4. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil.
5. Continue cooking for 2 more minutes.
6. Remove from the heat and stir in the food coloring.
7. Cool to room temperature.
8. Fold in the remaining 1 pint of strawberries.
9. Turn into the baked pie shell.
10. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
11. To serve, top with puffs of sweetened whipped cream.
